mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, product_id, product_name, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
